nicknameChangeTicket.desc: Instantly change your nickname before the 30-day cooldown.

shop.notice: Payments are processed via App Store.
shop.billingUnavailable: Billing not supported on this device.
shop.sessionExpired: Your login session has expired. Please sign in again.

leaderboard.placementNotice: You will appear in ranking after {{count}} placement games.

ad.limitReachedDesc: Come back tomorrow to watch more ads.
ad.adFreeDescPracticeNotes: Ad-free reward. Get 2 Practice Notes instantly.
ad.title: Get Pencils
ad.watchDesc: Watch a short ad to get 1 Pencil!
ad.watchDescPracticeNotes: Watch a short ad to get 2 Practice Notes!
ad.noFillDesc: Please try again in a moment.
ad.noFillRewarded: Oops, there is no ad to play right now! We'll give you the reward right away.

notifications.fullBody: Pencils are full. Time to use your brain!
notifications.reminderBody: It has been 24 hours. Come back and play!

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This is permanent and cannot be undone.
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.restorePurchasesDesc: Restore non-consumable purchases such as ad removal.
settings.restorePurchasesUnavailable: Billing not supported on this device.
settings.notificationNativeOnly: Notification settings are only available in the mobile app.
settings.notificationDeniedIos: Please allow notifications in iPhone Settings > Notifications.
settings.notificationDeniedAndroid: Please allow notifications in Android Settings > Notifications.
settings.supportDesc: Check help for bug reports, issues, and other inquiries.
settings.privacyPolicyDesc: Review how we handle personal data for the service.
settings.tutorialDesc: If you want to review how to use the app, watch the tutorial again.
settings.notificationNativeHint: Notification toggle is disabled on the web.
settings.assetCreditsDesc: Some visual assets are from third-party creators and are credited under their licenses (e.g. CC BY 4.0).
settings.announcementWillShowOnHome: The latest announcement will be shown again on Home.
settings.guestModeWarningDesc: Guest accounts may lose data when signing out, uninstalling, or changing devices. Link an account to keep your progress.

report.title: Report Player
report.description: Please enter the reason for this report.
report.descriptionWithTarget: Please enter a reason to report {{target}}.

profile.nicknameSetupDesc: Please enter a nickname to use in the game.
profile.guestDesc: Guest accounts can be lost if you sign out, delete the app, or change devices. Link a Google account to keep your progress. Also, guest accounts may be deleted after 7 days of inactivity.
profile.guestDescIOS: Guest accounts can be lost if you sign out, delete the app, or change devices. Link an Apple or Google account to keep your progress. Also, guest accounts may be deleted after 7 days of inactivity.
profile.removeAvatarConfirm: Do you want to remove your current profile photo?
profile.nicknameCooldownOrTicket: Nickname changes are free every 30 days. Use a ticket for instant changes.

game.rematchConfirmBody: Do you want to request a rematch?
game.rematchReceiverFreeNotice: Accepting a rematch does not cost a pencil.
game.rematchRequestFail: An error occurred while requesting a rematch.
game.reconnectingDesc: Opponent disconnected. Winning by default in:

matchmaking.timeoutDesc: We couldn't find an opponent in time.

home.resumeMatchTitle: You have a game in progress
home.resumeMatchDesc: You came back home. Do you want to return to your ongoing match?
home.loginModalSubtitle: Please sign in to start a Normal/Rank match.
home.noPencilDesc: You need pencils to play Normal/Rank mode.

rps.title: ROCK PAPER SCISSORS
rps.instruction: Pick the winning or losing move!

mathOx.title: MATH OX
mathOx.instruction: Tap O if right, X if wrong!

oneStroke.title: ONE STROKE
oneStroke.instruction: Connect all white tiles in a single stroke!

ten.title: MAKE 10
ten.instruction: Select numbers that add up to 10!

color.title: COLOR MATCH
color.instruction: Match the word's MEANING with its BORDER color!

memory.title: MEMORY MATCH
memory.instruction: Memorize cards, tap Ready, then find pairs!

updown.title: UP DOWN
updown.instruction: Higher than previous? Swipe UP. Lower? Swipe DOWN.

slider.title: Number Slider
slider.instruction: Swipe numbers to reach the target sum!

arrow.title: Arrow Slider
arrow.instruction: Blue: Same direction. Red: Opposite direction!

path.title: Path Runner
path.instruction: Move the green block to the blue goal!

blindPath.title: Blind Path
blindPath.instruction: Memorize the path and reach the goal. The path hides once you move!

catchColor.title: Color Catch
catchColor.instruction: Catch balls that match your bar's color!

tapTheColor.title: Tap the Color
tapTheColor.instruction: Memorize the colors, then tap them in the required order!

aim.title: Aiming Game
aim.instruction: Shoot only the red targets instantly!

sorting.title: Sorting Game
sorting.instruction: Same symbol = Same direction! Different symbol = Opposite direction!

spy.title: Find The Spy
spy.instruction: Memorize the symbols, then spot the new Spies!

timingBar.title: Timing Bar
timingBar.instruction: Tap exactly when the falling bar hits the target!

colorTiming.title: Color Timing
colorTiming.instruction: Tap when Blue enters Left, Red enters Right!

stairway.title: Stairway to Heaven
stairway.instruction: Tap the correct direction to climb the stairs!

tutorial.normal: 🌍 Battle players worldwide in fun minigames!
tutorial.rank: 🏆 Compete with players of similar skill in ranked matches!
tutorial.ranking: 👑 Check out the smartest players in the world!
tutorial.settings: ⚙️ Change sound, language and other settings!
tutorial.login: 👤 Link your account for safe play!
tutorial.profile: 📊 Check your skills, stats and high scores!
tutorial.tryModesAfter: Now tap Normal or Rank to start your first match!
tutorial.tryModesDesc: Tap Normal or Rank to start playing now.
tutorial.tryNormalHighlight: Tap Normal mode first to start your first match!

zero.title: Make Zero
zero.instruction: Fill the blanks to make the equation equal 0!

autoGuide.summary: Practice {{title}} and learn the core rule quickly.
autoGuide.tip: Read the rule once, then focus on speed and accuracy.
autoGuide.objectiveFallback: Start and follow the on-screen rule.

practice.noNotesDesc: You need Practice Notes to play Practice mode.

update.title: Update Required
update.message: A new version is available. Please update for the best experience.

login.bannedDurationUnknown: The suspension period is determined by the administrator.
login.bannedAppeal: If you want to appeal the suspension, please contact support.

review.enjoySubtitle: A quick review helps us a lot!

mailbox.title: Mailbox
mailbox.claimBlockedPencilsFull: You can't claim this while you have 5 or more pencils. Please use pencils first.
